705 GG0110A_PRIOR_MNL_WLCHR_IND GG0110A_PRIOR_MNL_WLCHR_IND GG0110A Prior Manual Wheelchair Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the resident's use of a manual wheelchair prior to the current illness, exacerbation, or injury. effective 10/01/2018
